pages.metaTitle: Auto-Generated Live Stream Thumbnail
pages.metaDescription: When a live stream ends without a set thumbnail, one is automatically generated from the stream and applied to the replay post
pages.content: # Auto-Generated Live Stream Thumbnail

pages.metaTitle: Post Views and Impressions CSV Export via API
pages.metaDescription: Admins can now generate and download a CSV report of post views and impressions via API
pages.content: # Post Views and Impressions CSV Export via API

pages.metaTitle: AI Moderation and Admin Reset for User Profiles
pages.metaDescription: AI moderation now automatically flags inappropriate profile photos, display names, and descriptions
pages.content: # AI Moderation and Admin Reset for User Profiles

pages.metaTitle: Multi-Level Comment Replies in Posts and Feeds
pages.metaDescription: Posts and activity feeds now support two levels of nested comment replies, making it easier to follow and join conversations.
pages.content: # Multi-Level Comment Replies in Posts and Feeds

pages.metaTitle: Upgraded Live Stream Room Management
pages.metaDescription: Admins can now create, manage, and monitor live streams directly from the Console.
pages.content: # Upgraded Live Stream Room Management

pages.metaTitle: Product Tagging and Pinning in Live Streams
pages.metaDescription: Admins and creators can now tag up to 20 products and pin them as overlays during live streams.
pages.content: # Product Tagging and Pinning in Live Streams

pages.metaTitle: Product Tagging in Post (Mix Media)
pages.metaDescription: Admins and creators can now tag products across any post type, text, image, or video.
pages.content: # Product Tagging in Post (Mix Media)

pages.metaTitle: Product Catalogue on Console
pages.metaDescription: Admins can now upload and manage a product catalogue in bulk via CSV or manually.
pages.content: # Product Catalogue on Console

pages.metaTitle: Non-Paginated Blocked Users List
pages.metaDescription: Retrieve a complete list of blocked users in one response without pagination, so your app can cache locally and perform real-time UI checks efficiently.
pages.content: # Non-Paginated Blocked Users List

pages.metaTitle: Time-Based Post Feed Filtering
pages.metaDescription: Query posts created after a specific date or timestamp, so your feed only surfaces content within a relevant time window. This keeps load times fast and data usage low for end users.
pages.content: # Time-Based Post Feed Filtering

pages.metaTitle: Exclude Roles in Community Member Query
pages.metaDescription: Query your community member list and exclude specific admin roles to get accurate member counts and more efficient data fetching, so your results reflect only the users that matter.
pages.content: # Exclude Roles in Community Member Query

pages.metaTitle: Create and Manage User Tags from the Console
pages.metaDescription: Admins can now create, assign, and manage custom tags to community members directly from the Console.
pages.content: # Create and Manage User Tags from the Console

pages.metaTitle: Event Creation and Management on Console
pages.metaDescription: Admins and moderators can now create and manage digital live streams, virtual events, and in-person gatherings directly from the Console.
pages.content: # Event Creation and Management on Console

pages.metaTitle: Intelligent Search with Semantic Understanding and Content Filtering
pages.metaDescription: Our new search API moves beyond exact keyword matching to understand user intent and improve content discovery across the platform.
pages.content: # Intelligent Search with Semantic Understanding and Content Filtering

pages.metaTitle: Dynamic UI: A New Chapter in UI Development
pages.metaDescription: Built on the new UI Kit 4 technology, Dynamic UI offers a faster and more modular way to build seamless community interfaces.
pages.content: # Dynamic UI: A New Chapter in UI Development

pages.metaTitle: Provide Specific Context with Content Report Reasons
pages.metaDescription: Community members can now provide specific context when reporting inappropriate content by selecting from predefined reasons like harassment or spam.
pages.content: # Provide Specific Context with Content Report Reasons

pages.metaTitle: Centralize All Reports with the Moderation Feed
pages.metaDescription: The new Moderation Feed brings every flagged post, comment, and message into one unified view.
pages.content: # Centralize All Reports with the Moderation Feed

pages.metaTitle: Swipeable Vertical Video with Clips
pages.metaDescription: Clips brings a familiar, high-engagement vertical video feed directly into your app.
pages.content: # Swipeable Vertical Video with Clips

pages.metaTitle: Granular Admin Access Controls
pages.metaDescription: Admins can now be assigned custom roles and permissions within the Console to enhance security and streamline workflows.
pages.content: # Granular Admin Access Controls

pages.metaTitle: Interactive Polls with Image Support and Flexible Voting
pages.metaDescription: We have enhanced our poll functionality to make them more engaging and user-friendly across all platforms.
pages.content: # Interactive Polls with Image Support and Flexible Voting

pages.metaTitle: Inactive User Management and Bulk Deletion
pages.metaDescription: Admins can now download a complete user list directly from the Console, including the last activity date for every account.
pages.content: # Inactive User Management and Bulk Deletion

pages.metaTitle: Multi-Stream Livestream Posts for Device-Specific Views in Console
pages.metaDescription: Admins can now create and manage multi-stream posts directly from the Console to provide a device-optimized viewing experience.
pages.content: # Multi-Stream Livestream Posts for Device-Specific Views in Console

pages.metaTitle: New Chat Features for Flutter UI Kit
pages.metaDescription: The Flutter Chat UI Kit now supports message and thread search, allowing users to quickly locate information within their conversations.
pages.content: # New Chat Features for Flutter UI Kit

pages.metaTitle: Track Content Quality and Contribution Level Across Your Community
pages.metaDescription: New user insights are now available in the Console to help admins identify top contributors and understand member impact.
pages.content: # Track Content Quality and Contribution Level Across Your Community

pages.metaTitle: Visitor Mode for Public Browsing and Analytics
pages.metaDescription: Visitor Mode allows anonymous users to browse and discover community content without signing in.
pages.content: # Visitor Mode for Public Browsing and Analytics

pages.metaTitle: Multimedia Posts in a Single Post
pages.metaDescription: Create a single post that combines photos, videos, and file attachments like PDFs enabling richer storytelling and cleaner feeds without splitting content across multiple posts.
pages.content: # Multimedia Posts in a Single Post

pages.metaTitle: In-Stream Engagement and Moderation
pages.metaDescription: New features have been added to the live experience to improve both the creator's control and the viewer's experience.
pages.content: # In-Stream Engagement and Moderation

pages.metaTitle: Live Streaming and Event Support: Scheduling, Co-streaming, and Real-Time Engagement
pages.metaDescription: We have expanded our video infrastructure to support the full lifecycle of live content, from initial scheduling to real-time broadcast management.
pages.content: # Live Streaming and Event Support: Scheduling, Co-streaming, and Real-Time Engagement

pages.metaTitle: Network-Level Live Stream Notification Control
pages.metaDescription: Take control of your broadcast environment with a network-level safety switch for livestream push notifications.
pages.content: # Network-Level Live Stream Notification Control

pages.metaTitle: Content Performance Widgets and Reports on Dashboard
pages.metaDescription: Drill into individual post performance with content performance widgets that track impressions, reach, and engagement trends over time.
pages.content: # Content Performance Widgets and Reports on Dashboard

pages.metaTitle: Live Stream Analytics with Real-Time Insights
pages.metaDescription: See how your live streams perform with real-time metrics on viewers, engagement, watch time, and audience retention patterns.
pages.content: # Live Stream Analytics with Real-Time Insights
